author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 3e831cf8. Extended profile_op_scope wrapping to 18 additional ops: div/neg/pow/sqrt/abs (arithmetic.rs), exp/log/sin/cos (transcendental.rs), mean/prod/sum_dim/mean_dim (reduction.rs), and relu/sigmoid/tanh/gelu/silu/log_softmax (activation.rs). Each op validates + meta-propagates outside the scope and dispatches to a private *_inner helper. Auto-instrumented set is now 22 core tensor ops. 3941 workspace tests pass with no behavioral changes.
